_meta.name: OUTRAGE — Canva Export
_meta.description: Triggered from the UI. Calls Canva Connect API to create a design from a content variant or trend cluster. POSTs design URLs to /api/webhooks/canva.
_notes: Canva Connect API requires OAuth2 setup.
First run: user must authorize via /api/auth/canva OAuth flow.
n8n uses the stored access token to call Canva API.
Alternative: use Canva's 'Create with Canva' button (simpler, no API key needed).

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body
return [{ json: {
  cluster_id: body.cluster_id || null,
  variant_id: body.variant_id || null,
  platform:   body.platform || 'instagram',
  org_id:     body.org_id,
  run_id:     body.run_id || null
}}]

const variant = $('Load Content Variant').first()?.json
const cluster = $('Load Cluster for Context').first()?.json
const platform = $('Load Variant or Cluster').first().json.platform

const platformDimensions = {
  instagram:  { width: 1080, height: 1080 },
  tiktok:     { width: 1080, height: 1920 },
  twitter:    { width: 1200, height: 675 },
  all:        { width: 1080, height: 1080 }
}

const dims = platformDimensions[platform] || platformDimensions.instagram

return [{ json: {
  design_title: `${cluster?.title || variant?.caption || 'OUTRAGE'} — ${platform}`,
  width:  dims.width,
  height: dims.height,
  content: variant?.caption || variant?.body || cluster?.title || '',
  hashtags: (variant?.hashtags || cluster?.keywords || []).slice(0, 10).map(h => `#${h}`).join(' ')
}}]

nodes.name: Canva Create Design (HTTP)
nodes._comment: Requires Canva OAuth2 credential in n8n. See: https://www.canva.com/developers/docs/connect/quick-start/

parameters.jsCode:
const canvaResponse = $input.first().json
const meta = $('Build Canva Design Payload').first().json
const source = $('Load Variant or Cluster').first().json

return [{ json: {
  org_id:       source.org_id,
  run_id:       source.run_id,
  status:       'success',
  items_processed: 1,
  exports: [{
    cluster_id:   source.cluster_id,
    variant_id:   source.variant_id,
    design_name:  meta.design_title,
    design_url:   canvaResponse.design?.url || canvaResponse.url,
    edit_url:     canvaResponse.design?.edit_url || canvaResponse.edit_url,
    preview_url:  canvaResponse.design?.thumbnail?.url || null,
    platform:     source.platform
  }]
}}]
